row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a multi-lane urban road with slight rightward drift.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Vehicles ahead maintain forward trajectories; no sudden stops or erratic turns observed.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene during daylight with clear visibility. Road includes multiple lanes, crosswalks, traffic lights, and construction barriers on the left. Buildings line both sides of the street.
traffic_elements: red traffic light (visible in some frames)
semantic.visibility_notes: All key objects are clearly visible without distortion or occlusion issues.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward motion of ego vehicle; vehicles ahead move consistently without abrupt changes.
logical.object_continuity: Objects remain continuously visible across frames; no sudden appearance/disappearance.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure, buildings, and infrastructure remain stable and coherent over time.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily, approaching an intersection with red light.
decision.risk_context: No immediate risk detected; standard urban driving context with expected stopping behavior at red light.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street scene but with noticeable blurring and loss of detail. Some elements appear distorted or merged.
semantic.visibility_notes: Many details are blurred or missing; object boundaries are less defined compared to Row 1.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion appears smoother than real video but lacks fine-grained temporal fidelity; minor flickering in background structures.
logical.object_continuity: Some objects show slight positional jumps or fading between frames; overall continuity is maintained but degraded.
logical.structure_continuity: Building facades and road geometry show mild warping and instability, especially near edges.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle appears to continue forward, though trajectory is less precise due to visual degradation.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability may impair accurate decision-making; potential for misinterpretation of traffic signals or obstacles.

newly_introduced_elements: minor ghosting artifacts around moving vehicles
slight color bleeding in building textures
